Agent records

Concepts7 Decisions15 Devlog18 Notes3 Symbols7 Links2

Append-only record revisions

Record updates append a new JSONL revision with the same logical id, while deletes append a tombstone that active reads, rendering, and search exclude.

Home / Concepts
Concept recordsv1architecture

Summary

Record updates append a new JSONL revision with the same logical id, while deletes append a tombstone that active reads, rendering, and search exclude.

Details

Validation accepts repeated ids only as ordered revisions. Status, render, search, and record list/get use the latest non-deleted revision.

Related files

  • src/core/schemas.ts
  • src/core/store.ts
  • src/core/validator.ts
  • src/cli/commands/record.ts
